_proxyComment: ApiBaseUri MUST include the `/api/` prefix — the proxy extracts everything after `/api/proxy/` as the downstream path. For `/api/proxy/v1/whoami` the extracted path is `v1/whoami`; combined with this base URI the final URL becomes `http://localhost:5044/api/v1/whoami`, matching the Api's route.
_spaHostingComment: Web.UI serves the Angular SPA from disk. Dev workflow: `npm run watch` in ClientApp/ writes builds to StaticRoot on every change; the host picks them up. Hard-refresh the browser to load new bundles (no HMR by design — prod-parity static serving).
_azureAdComment: Web.UI confidential-client OIDC — flip Enabled to true AFTER completing Phase-9 A1 (Azure portal App Registration). ClientSecret MUST come from user-secrets (`dotnet user-secrets set "AzureAd:ClientSecret" <value>` inside src/UI/Enterprise.Platform.Web.UI), NEVER this file. TenantId + ClientId below are placeholders — replace with registration values from the portal. See Docs/Security/bff-oidc-setup.md for the full runbook.
